title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow combining Claude Opus, Gemini 3.5 Flash, and Archon to build frontends. He argues Gemini produces the most beautiful UIs while Opus excels at planning and integrations. The workflow uses Opus for planning and copy, Gemini for UI design, and Opus again for integrations and deployment.
